value.string: This Bot will automatically consolidates all excel files in a folder to a Master Excel file  with choice of a single spreadsheet or separate spreadsheet
Open and read the input excel and store the data into spesified variables
Catch the Error Message and Line Number
Error Message stored to the text file
Go to the get data and assign to the folder
